ddls:
CREATE TABLE "passengers" (
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passenger */,
  "survived" INTEGER /* Survival status (0 = No, 1 = Yes) */,
  "pclass" INTEGER /* Passenger class (1, 2, or 3) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "age" REAL /* Age of the passenger */,
  "sibsp" INTEGER /* Number of siblings/spouses aboard */,
  "parch" INTEGER /* Number of parents/children aboard */,
  "fare" REAL /* Fare paid by the passenger */,
  "passenger_name" TEXT /* Full name of the passenger */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the passenger */,
  "embarked_port" TEXT /* Port from which the passenger embarked */,
  "disembarked_port" TEXT /* Port where the passenger disembarked */,
  "cabin_number" TEXT /* Cabin number assigned to the passenger */,
  "lifeboat_number" TEXT /* Lifeboat number if the passenger survived */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any medical conditions of the passenger */,
  "passenger_status" TEXT /* Current status of the passenger (e.g., deceased, alive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyages" (
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage */,
  "ship_name" TEXT /* Name of the ship */,
  "departure_port" TEXT /* Port from which the ship departed */,
  "arrival_port" TEXT /* Port at which the ship arrived */,
  "departure_date" TEXT /* Date of departure */,
  "arrival_date" TEXT /* Date of arrival */,
  "voyage_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of voyage */,
  "captain_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the captain of the voyage */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers on the voyage */,
  "total_crew" INTEGER /* Total number of crew members on the voyage */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the voyage */,
  "sea_conditions" TEXT /* Sea conditions during the voyage */,
  "vessel_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vessel */,
  "vessel_tonnage" REAL /* Tonnage of the vessel */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_captain_id FOREIGN KEY ("captain_id") REFERENCES crew_members ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_voyages_voyage_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_type_id") REFERENCES voyage_types ("voyage_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tickets" (
  "ticket_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ticket */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger who purchased the ticket */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voyage associated with the ticket */,
  "ticket_class" TEXT /* Class of the ticket purchased (e.g., First, Second, Third) */,
  "ticket_fare" REAL /* Fare of the ticket purchased */,
  "cabin_class" TEXT /* Cabin class (e.g., A, B, C) */,
  "booking_date" TEXT /* Date the ticket was booked */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "booking_agent" TEXT /* Name of the booking agent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ticket_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tickets_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "survival_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survival statistic record */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voyage related to the statistics */,
  "total_passengers" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers on the voyage */,
  "survived_count" INTEGER /* Number of passengers who survived */,
  "survival_rate" REAL /* Survival rate calculated as a percentage */,
  "survived_by_class" TEXT /* Survival rate by class */,
  "survived_by_gender" TEXT /* Survival rate by gender */,
  "survived_by_age_group" TEXT /* Survival rate by age group */,
  "survived_by_cabin_class" TEXT /* Survival rate by cabin class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_survival_statistics_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the associated passenger */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the passenger (e.g., Child, Adult, Senior) */,
  "sex" TEXT /* Gender of the passenger */,
  "fare_group" TEXT /* Group based on fare paid (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the passenger */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the passenger */,
  "income_group" TEXT /* Income group of the passenger */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "family_relationships" (
  "relationship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each relationship record */,
  "passenger_id_1" INTEGER /* Reference to the first passenger in a relationship */,
  "passenger_id_2" INTEGER /* Reference to the second passenger in a relationship */,
  "relationship_type" TEXT /* Type of relationship (e.g., sibling, parent, spouse) */,
  "relationship_status" TEXT /* Current status of the relationship (e.g., alive, deceased) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("relationship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_passenger_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id_1") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_family_relationships_passenger_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id_2") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fare_analysis" (
  "fare_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fare record */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voyage related to the fare analysis */,
  "fare_category" TEXT /* Category of fare (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "total_fare" REAL /* Total fare collected in this category */,
  "average_fare" REAL /* Average fare in this category */,
  "total_passengers_in_category" INTEGER /* Total number of passengers in this fare category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fare_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fare_analysis_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "voyage_types" (
  "voyage_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each voyage type */,
  "voyage_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the voyage type (e.g., Transatlantic, Coastal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the voyage type */,
  "average_duration" INTEGER /* Average duration of voyages of this type (in days) */,
  "average_distance" INTEGER /* Average distance of voyages of this type (in nautical miles) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("voyage_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voyage they are associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member on the ship */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the crew member */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the crew member joined the voyage */,
  "date_left" TEXT /* Date the crew member left the voyage */,
  "emergency_role" TEXT /* Role of the crew member during emergencies */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crew_members_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "safety_protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each safety protocol */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voyage related to the protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the safety protocol */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the safety protocol */,
  "protocol_date" TEXT /* Date the protocol was implemented */,
  "protocol_effectiveness" TEXT /* Effectiveness of the protocol (e.g., High, Medium, Low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_safety_protocols_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback record */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger giving feedback */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voyage for which feedback is given */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the passenger (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the passenger about their experience */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date the feedback was submitted */,
  "feedback_category" TEXT /* Category of the feedback (e.g., Service, Food, Safety) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emergency_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voyage where the incident occurred */,
  "incident_type" TEXT /* Type of incident (e.g., Fire, Collision) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date when the incident occurred */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (e.g., Minor, Major) */,
  "incident_response_time" INTEGER /* Response time in minutes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emergency_incidents_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passenger_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "passenger_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the passenger for the report */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voyage related to the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., Survival, Feedback) */,
  "report_details" TEXT /* Detailed information about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_reports_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passenger_reports_passenger_id FOREIGN KEY ("passenger_id") REFERENCES passengers ("passenger_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "voyage_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the voyage associated with historical data */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event recorded */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "incident_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the incident (if applicable) */,
  "incident_response_time" INTEGER /* Response time in minutes (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_voyage_id FOREIGN KEY ("voyage_id") REFERENCES voyages ("voyage_id")
)
